source_tiers.S0: Government, regulator, official transport or attraction authority.
source_tiers.S1: Official venue website, current menu, booking page or official channel.
source_tiers.S1D: Direct visit, call, WhatsApp or email confirmation with date and verifier.
source_tiers.S2: GBP, major booking platform or authoritative publication; corroboration only.
source_tiers.S3: Reviews, third-party social posts or aggregators; discovery only.
source_tiers.S4: AI output; never a source and never sufficient for verification.

publication_rule: A factual claim cannot pass facts_verified unless its source and verification fields are complete. AI may draft wording but cannot create evidence.
